meta.title: DK22 — Convenience Store | Canasvieiras
meta.description: Canasvieiras' corner store, always close by — day or late night.

hero.subtitle: Canasvieiras' corner store, always close by — day or late night.

sobre.title: Your corner store in Canasvieiras
sobre.text: DK22 is the neighborhood convenience store: whatever you're missing at home, at the beach, or at night, it's here — ice, cold drinks, cigarettes and more.
sobre.li2: A selection built for the beach: from ice to sparkling wine
sobre.li3: Open every day, with extra hands on weekends

cardapio.title: What's in the house
cardapio.text: The full menu is coming soon. In the meantime, message us on WhatsApp and we'll send you everything.

mock.title: Digital menu coming soon
mock.text: Spirits, gin & vodka, sparkling wine, tobacco, ice and cold drinks — all in one tap.

local.title: Come on over
local.text: In Canasvieiras, steps from the beach. Summer or winter, someone's always on duty.
local.note: We open sometime between 10am and 12pm — but we always close at 2am, every single day.

map.text: Rua Madre Maria Villac, 1271 - Canasvieiras, Florianópolis - SC

delivery.title: Don't want to go out? We'll bring it.
delivery.text: DK22's own delivery, no middleman — direct order, fast delivery.

social.title: Behind the scenes, deals and the night

footer.note: DK22 · Rua Madre Maria Villac, 1271 - Canasvieiras, Florianópolis - SC · Family business
